name: breadcrumb
description: Secondary navigation trail showing the user's current location in a page hierarchy (<nav aria-label> landmark + ordered <ol>, real <a href> for non-current items, aria-current='page' on the current last item, aria-hidden separators). WAI-ARIA APG Breadcrumb (nav of links) pattern. Size param scales type (sm/md/lg), not height. Collapsed mode hides middle items behind a keyboard-reachable <button> ellipsis; expansion is a server-side controller decision (the PARTIAL is stateless). Href scheme allowlist guard (only /, #, http://, https:// trusted). Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012), no enhancer, no JS.
docs: Copies the breadcrumb partial to your JTE root at lievit/breadcrumb.jte, reached as @template.lievit.breadcrumb(items=...). Pass items as a List<Map<String,String>> root-to-current; each map carries label (required), href (optional; only /, #, http://, https:// allowed — others render as non-link span), and attrs (optional, TRUSTED raw author-controlled extras). The last item is always the current page (aria-current='page'). Set navLabel to override the nav landmark's aria-label (e.g. for i18n). Set separator to change the divider glyph (default '/'). Set size to 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' for type-scale sizing. Set collapsed=true with maxVisible (default 3) to hide the middle items behind an ellipsis button; the button is keyboard-reachable but inert until wired in a WIRE context. The source is yours: edit freely.
